title: Simulati
description: Simulati is a Fabric mod that increases the playable range of the Minecraft world from 30,000,000 to 2,147,483,647.
body:
Simulati is a Fabric mod that increases the playable range of the Minecraft world from 30,000,000 to 2,147,483,647.

![2^30](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b0YtNmHH/images/415d469f63031821787e2682cb6caa62ee1d0ba5.png)
